negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_88cd7392-a6ce-4282-bffe-f3355ce13f12
prompt: In a medium shot at eye level, two young women stand side by side in an outdoor setting, framed by a large white metal panel with rust patches and a textured surface. The woman on the left sports two high twisted buns atop her head, with her long, shiny brown hair cascading down in smooth curls. She wears a glossy black outfit with a high neckline and a cutout design just above the chest, revealing her skin. Her makeup includes red lipstick and black eyeliner with a small winged effect. The woman on the right has her hair tied back in a thick braid that drapes over her shoulder, with a few loose strands framing her face, which moves slightly in the wind. She is dressed in an unbuttoned white collared shirt under a black vest, paired with a loose black tie.  The two women face each other initially before turning to look at the camera. Their expressions are serious; their eyebrows are furrowed, and there are light wrinkle lines at the center of their foreheads. The woman on the left has her mouth slightly open, showing her teeth, while the woman on the right lifts her left hand, flicks something out of it, and then lowers it, tilting her head slightly to the right. They both shift to the left and move toward the camera, gradually becoming out of focus as the video concludes. The scene is well-lit with natural sunlight, casting sharp shadows and overexposing parts of their faces. In the background, a dark interior of a tall structure is visible on the right, with items leaning against a vertical pillar.
